items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where data deletion cascades to third parties. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations that demonstrate this behavior. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide relevant information to confirm or deny the expected outcome of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
